title: Property Tests, Algebraic Laws, and Pipeline Diagnostics · Equational Recall
summary: Prove a normalization and aggregation library across generated changed cases and injected faults. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a law-oriented regression and diagnostics suite after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate concrete examples from general properties and generate boundary-rich cases.
Test identity, associativity, idempotence, or round-trip laws only where contracts claim them.
Attach diagnostic taps at effect boundaries without changing transformed values.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')

# Extend one pure, lazy, tested pipeline increment per activity.

steps.title: Example Properties · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — A local decision core receives an injected clock and storage callable. Replaying the same 4-event fixture must reproduce decisions while I/O failures stay at the imperative boundary.

Which action demonstrates Example Properties without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for separate concrete examples from general properties and generate boundary-rich cases.

stimulus.title: Performance Properties case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A local decision core receives an injected clock and storage callable. Replaying the same 5-event fixture must reproduce decisions while I/O failures stay at the imperative boundary.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A single fast run proves complexity.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Measure bounded consumption and scaling without turning timing noise into correctness claims. Artifact under review: a law-oriented regression and diagnostics suite.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Performance Properties, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Hide effects inside the transformation, mutate its input, and accept one plausible return value as proof of Performance Properties.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Performance Properties: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A local decision core receives an injected clock and storage callable. Replaying the same 6-event fixture must reproduce decisions while I/O failures stay at the imperative boundary.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Measure bounded consumption and scaling without turning timing noise into correctness claims.
